creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 235340
Patch file

Update to 1.29.0.

ChangeLog:      https://github.com/certbot/certbot/releases/tag/v1.29.0

* Build succeeds with poudriere and 13.1-RELEASE amd64 jail.
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-acme test` is "291 passed, 76 warnings".
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-certbot test` is "991 passed, 28 skipped, 445 warnings".
